mapper.insert: insert into dish(name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.delete: delete from dish where id in #{item}
mapper.select:
select dish.* , category.name as category_name from dish left join category on dish.category_id = category.id where dish.status = 1
and dish.category_id = #{categoryId}
select count(*) from dish where status = #{status}
